Queries.AddProduct: INSERT INTO storehub_db.product (ProductName, Description, Brand, SKU, Price, Stock, CategoryId, ImageUrl) VALUES (@ProductName, @Description, @Brand, UUID(), @Price, @Stock, @CategoryId, @ImageUrl);
Queries.UpdateProduct: UPDATE storehub_db.product SET ProductName=@ProductName, Description=@Description, Brand=@Brand, Price=@Price, Stock=@Stock, CategoryId=@CategoryId, ImageUrl=@ImageUrl, IsActive=@IsActive WHERE ProductId=@ProductId;
